title: What If We Gave Away $1,000,000?
topic: The economic and social chaos of giving away a million dollars
brief: What would happen if someone gave away $1,000,000 in a single day? Would the winner go broke? Would it change their life forever? Explore the extreme hypothetical of a massive giveaway.

title: What If The Sun Disappeared For 1 Second?
topic: The catastrophic effects of the sun vanishing for one second
brief: What would happen if the sun just blinked out for one second? Would we survive? What would be the immediate consequences on Earth?

title: I Gave Away My Entire Car Collection
topic: Giving away luxury cars to strangers
brief: I gave away my entire collection of luxury cars to random strangers. Their reactions were unbelievable. Who got them? Why did I do it?

title: What If Everyone Got $1,000,000?
topic: The global consequences of everyone receiving $1,000,000
brief: What if every person in the world woke up with $1,000,000 in their bank account? Would the economy collapse? Would society change forever?

title: I Spent $100,000 On Random Strangers
topic: A social experiment giving away $100,000 to strangers
brief: I gave away $100,000 to random strangers on the street. Watch their reactions. Some cried. Some were shocked. What would you do if a stranger gave you $10,000?

title: What If Money Didn't Exist?
topic: A world without money or currency
brief: What if money suddenly disappeared from the world? Would society collapse? How would we trade, work, and survive without currency?

title: I Bought Everything In A Store For Strangers
topic: Buying out an entire store and giving it away
brief: I walked into a store and bought everything on the shelves... then gave it all away to strangers. Their reactions were priceless.

title: What If You Could Time Travel For 1 Minute?
topic: The consequences of having just 60 seconds to time travel
brief: If you had just one minute to travel back in time, what would you do? Would you try to change history? Would you warn yourself about something?

title: I Gave Away $10,000 On The Street Every Hour
topic: Giving away $10,000 every hour for 24 hours
brief: I gave away $10,000 every hour for 24 hours straight. 24 strangers received $10,000 each. Their reactions, their stories, and the emotional moments.

title: What If Everyone Was A Millionaire?
topic: A world where everyone is a millionaire
brief: What if everyone in the world was a millionaire? Would inflation destroy the economy? Would prices skyrocket? Explore the mind-blowing consequences.
